data.title: Stock futures rise on Thursday, as August CPI increases 0.4% in line with consensus view. Initial jobless claims rise to 263,000. Fed expected to cut rates. Dow +0.06%, S&P 500 +0.13%, Nasdaq 100 +0.20%. SPY up 0.15% to $653.20, QQQ up 0.20% to $581.88. Mixed close for U.S. stocks on Wednesday, with energy and tech stocks gaining. Producer Price Index down 0.1% in August.
data.description: U.S. stock futures were up following a mixed close, with major benchmark indices higher. In August, the Consumer Price Index rose by 0.4% on a seasonally adjusted basis, while over the last year, it increased by 2.9%. Initial jobless claims rose to 263,000. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.05%, and the two-year bond was at 3.55%. The market projects a 100% likelihood of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates. Futures for Dow Jones rose by 0.06%, S&P 500 by 0.13%, Nasdaq 100 by 0.20%, and Russell 2000 fell by 0.21%. ETFs like SPDR S&P 500 Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose in premarket trading. Sectors that gained on Wednesday were energy and information technology, while others like consumer discretionary and health care recorded losses. The S&P 500 reached new highs, but the Dow Jones fell over 200 points. AI-linked stocks rallied amidst investor optimism.

data.title: Malaysia and Zetrix AI collaborate to create Shariah-compliant AI, developing world's first NurAi LLM.
data.description: In a notable development towards integrating Islamic principles into artificial intelligence technology, Zetrix AI Berhad has unveiled the world's primary Shariah-compliant Large Language Model (LLM) called NurAi. This innovative project is in collaboration with the Malaysian Government, facilitated by the Prime Minister. This initiative marks a crucial advancement in AI technology, showcasing Malaysia's commitment to incorporating Islamic values.

data.title: Inspira achieves 97.35% accuracy with HYLA blood sensor, moving towards FDA submission.
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., based in Ra'anana, Israel, revealed groundbreaking news on September 11, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as IINN, known for its innovative life-support and diagnostic technologies, shared a major milestone regarding its HYLA blood sensor. The sensor demonstrated an impressive 97.35% accuracy rate during the latest round of performance testing. These results are crucial as they will bolster the Company's submission to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for approval. This achievement marks a substantial improvement from earlier data disclosed during a clinical study on March 4, 2025.

data.title: Investor deadline near: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates Altimmune, urging investors with losses over $75,000 to contact them.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is extending an invitation to investors who have experienced losses surpassing $75,000 in Altimmune between August 10, 2023, and June 25, 2025. If you fall into this category, please reach out directly to him to explore available options.

data.title: By 2030, the Solid State Relay Market to reach $2.36 billion, growing at 6.3% CAGR from $1.74 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report by MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts significant growth for the solid state relay market. Starting at USD 1.74 billion in 2025, the market is expected to reach USD 2.36 billion by 2030, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.3% during this period. This projection highlights a positive trajectory for the solid state relay (SSR) market in the upcoming years.

data.title: In Aug 2025, US faced stagflation as CPI rose by 2.9% YoY & core CPI at 3.1%, Fed challenged with tough decisions.
data.description: Recent economic reports have shown a concerning blend of surging prices and a significant jump in jobless claims, creating a stagflationary scenario in the U.S. that poses a difficult challenge for the Federal Reserve. In August 2025, the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increased by 2.9% compared to the previous year, meeting expectations and reaching the highest level since January. Monthly inflation also accelerated to 0.4%, surpassing the anticipated 0.3% rise and exceeding July's 0.2% increase. Excluding the volatile food and energy sectors, core CPI remained constant at 3.1% year-on-year, aligning with forecasts but still notably above the Fed's targeted 2% rate. Core prices saw a 0.3% increase on a monthly basis, with housing costs being the primary contributor, rising by 0.4% in August. Food prices went up by 0.5% overall, led by a 0.6% surge in grocery prices. This data places the Fed in a challenging position as it navigates the economic landscape.

data.title: Investor deadline approaching: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Replimune investors with losses exceeding $50,000. Contact to discuss options.
data.description: Investors who experienced losses of over $50,000 in Replimune between November 22, 2024, and July 21, 2025, are urged by Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP to reach out directly to explore their potential legal options.

data.title: Investors urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP to contact if suffered losses >$75,000 in RxSight between Nov 7, 2024 - July 8, 2025.

The losses must have occurred within the period from November 7, 2024, to July 8, 2025. If you meet these criteria, it is advised to contact James (Josh) Wilson directly to explore potential avenues for recourse.

data.title: Global dairy herd management market to reach $8.88 billion by 2032 from $4.99 billion in 2025, at 8.6% CAGR.
data.description: In September 13, 2025, Delray Beach saw growth in the global Dairy Herd Management Market from US$4.16 billion in 2024 to US$4.99 billion in 2025. Projections suggest a strong CAGR of 8.6% between 2025 and 2032, with an anticipated value reaching US$8.88 billion.

data.title: Top Web3 security experts make millions finding DeFi flaws, dwarfing $300K in traditional cybersecurity pay.
data.description: Highly skilled Web3 security experts are making substantial earnings by identifying vulnerabilities in decentralized finance (DeFi) projects, with some individuals reportedly earning millions. These earnings far exceed the salary limits of traditional cybersecurity professionals, which are typically capped at $300,000. The significant disparity in earnings highlights the lucrative opportunities available in the emerging Web3 sector for those with the expertise to uncover and address critical flaws in decentralized systems.

data.title: Integration with Web2 crucial for Web3 success. Gradual embrace of existing infrastructure speeds up mainstream adoption.
data.description: The mainstream adoption of Web3 hinges on its incorporation of existing Web2 infrastructure, instead of seeking to completely replace it. By gradually integrating with Web2 technologies, trust is established and the path to widespread acceptance is expedited. This approach ensures a smoother transition and facilitates the adoption of Web3 technologies by a larger audience.

data.title: Intersection of DeFi and AI poses security challenges. Rigorous auditing needed to protect decentralized systems. #Transparency #Security
data.description: The utilization of AI in decentralized finance (DeFi) is leading to the emergence of fresh security vulnerabilities. To safeguard decentralized systems, there is a pressing need for thorough and transparent auditing processes. This emphasizes the importance of ensuring the security of DeFi platforms, especially in light of the increasing adoption rates and the vast amounts of capital involved.

data.title: "Startup Twerk From Home strives to make exotic dancing a legit sport, with crypto support for betting."
data.description: Twerk From Home aims to elevate exotic dancing as a legitimate sport, emphasizing professionalism. Interestingly, crypto enthusiasts have the opportunity to place bets on the activity. This initiative seeks to change perceptions and create a new platform for dancers, potentially reaching a wider audience.

data.title: Tezos price jumps 3.4% to $0.79, technical signals show bullish momentum as it nears resistance levels.
data.description: The price of XTZ has surged to $0.79, showing strong momentum indicators that suggest the possibility of further increases. Tezos is nearing significant resistance levels, indicating the potential for continued upward movement.

data.title: Stock market at highs, Tesla surges, Nvidia & Meta near buy zones as Fed meeting approaches.
data.description: The stock market is experiencing a significant upturn, with Tesla leading the race while Nvidia and Meta are also showing promising signs. The impending Federal Reserve meeting is a key factor to watch. Dow Jones Futures reflect this positive trend, with the market reaching new highs. Investors are particularly eyeing buy opportunities for Nvidia, Meta, and Tesla as they approach attractive levels.

data.title: OM price jumps by 4.7% to $0.23 amid bullish MACD and stochastic indicators, hinting at potential breakout.
data.description: The price of OM has surged to $0.23, marking a daily gain of 4.7%. This increase has been accompanied by a bullish turn in the MACD histogram and the stochastic indicators entering overbought territory. These developments indicate a potential shift in momentum for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Tesla and Nvidia are top stocks to watch as S&P 500 hits record highs with AI-led market rally.
data.description: Two of the five stocks near buy zones to watch amidst the AI-led market rally at record highs in the S&P 500 are Tesla and Nvidia. These companies are leading the stocks to watch as the market reaches record highs, according to Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: EIGEN rises 12% to $1.63 with bullish indicators signaling more gains after breaking key resistances.
data.description: The value of EIGEN has surged to $1.63, supported by robust momentum indicators hinting at additional upside potential. The token has surpassed crucial resistance levels, indicating a positive trend going forward.

data.title: ETHFI price rises above Bollinger Bands, jumping 4.71% to $1.49 with RSI at 69.48, showing strong bullish momentum.
data.description: The price of ETHFI has increased by 4.71% to reach $1.49, with technical indicators showing bullish signals. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 69.48, indicating strong momentum and surpassing key resistance levels.
